title: disterigma terniflorum
intro: Disterigma terniflorum, also known as the "Mountain Mint", is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Disterigma terniflorum include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from headaches and colds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol.
